name: Oportun
description_short: Long Beach, CA's Oportun at 730 Long Beach Blvd suite g offers personal loans with flexible terms and rapid approval.
description_long:
Oportun's Long Beach location sits at 730 Long Beach Boulevard, Suite G, a standalone office in the heart of Long Beach, CA. The branch is conveniently located for walk-in customers seeking personal loans. Operating hours are Monday through Friday from 11 AM to 6:30 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM, making it accessible for both working professionals and weekend shoppers.

At this Long Beach office, Oportun specializes in personal loans designed for California residents who need flexible financing. You can contact the branch at +1 562-263-2002 to discuss loan options, get pre-qualification details, or schedule an appointment. The team here handles applications, loan reviews, and customer service for all personal loan products.

When visiting the Long Beach branch, bring a valid ID and proof of income to speed up the application process. Oportun serves Long Beach residents looking for quick, flexible personal loans without the lengthy approval timelines of traditional banks.
address: 730 Long Beach Blvd suite g, Long Beach, CA 90813

company_info.headquarters: 730 Long Beach Blvd suite g, Long Beach, CA 90813

pros: Extensive in-person payment network accepting cash at grocery stores, pharmacies, and corner stores nationwide
Physical store locations across nearly all U.S. states for in-person application and service
Accepts multiple payment methods through partner networks (Dolex, Barri, CheckFreePay, MoneyGram, PayNearMe)
Offers both unsecured and secured loan options for different credit situations
Mobile app with referral bonus incentive ($50 one-time bonus extended through April 15)
Serves geographically diverse market with Spanish-language support (Español option visible)
No P.O. Box addresses required—accommodates consumers with limited formal documentation
cons: Website provides zero transparency on APR rates, loan amounts, or repayment terms
No disclosure of credit score requirements, approval odds, or qualification criteria
Some payment partner fees apply (PayNearMe charges $1.75 for cash or $1.49 for debit)
Limited information about loan purposes, funding speed, or terms available
No pricing comparison or rate examples provided to assess competitiveness
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who prefer in-person payment options over online banking
Borrowers without traditional credit histories seeking secured loan options with collateral
Individuals in underserved areas with limited digital infrastructure or internet access
diagnosis: Oportun is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need in-person loan access and flexible cash-based payment options, particularly those without traditional bank accounts or reliable internet access. The main caveat is complete lack of rate and term transparency on their website—borrowers must contact the company directly to learn APRs, loan amounts, and repayment periods before deciding.
services: Secured personal loans with vehicle collateral
In-person loan applications at physical store locations
Cash and debit payments at retail payment locations
Mobile app for loan management and referrals
meta_description: Oportun at 730 Long Beach Blvd, Long Beach, CA. Fast personal loans with flexible terms and same-day approval.
